Description: Ignites a target or object. Scales from a spark to a conflagration engulfing a zone.
Tier 1 Default: Strike one target for 1d6 fire damage.

Description: Sustained combustion: fire that spreads and lingers. Duration and area over burst damage.
Tier 1 Default: Target continues burning for 1 round after hit: takes 1 damage at start of their turn.

Description: Toxic fumes. Poisons targets. Scales to a persistent poisoned zone.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes RES save or gains Poison condition (1 slot).

Description: Dissolution by heat. Destroys objects softens armor collapses structures. Fire as entropy.
Tier 1 Default: Destroy or significantly damage one non-magical object.

Description: The forge rune. Hardens weapons and armor transmutes materials. Fire and earth as craft.
Tier 1 Default: One weapon or piece of armor gains +1 to its relevant roll until next rest.

Description: Draconic fire / void serpent. Mage: ancient destructive flame. Shaman: great serpent spirit communion.
Tier 1 Default: Strike one target for 1d6: ignores AR 1 armor.
Notes: Shared rune: different fictional framing by tradition

Description: Concussive explosion. Not fire per se but the force of ignition: knockback and impact.
Tier 1 Default: One target takes 1d6 damage and is knocked back one zone.
Notes: Could also live in a Force category

Description: Flowing water: push pull current wave. Force and movement. Scales from a jet to a flood.
Tier 1 Default: Push one target back one zone or knock them prone.

Description: Ice and frost. Freezes targets creates slick terrain. Immobilization over raw damage.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes AGI save or is slowed: half movement next round.

Description: Obscuring vapor. Cover concealment blurs vision. Utility and evasion.
Tier 1 Default: Create a zone of mist: all ranged attacks into or through it are at -1.

Description: A cresting surge. More aggressive than TIDE: impact and knockback.
Tier 1 Default: All targets in a zone make AGI save or are knocked prone.

Description: Persistent precipitation. Slows enemies extinguishes fire creates difficult terrain.
Tier 1 Default: Zone becomes difficult terrain for 1d6 rounds. Extinguishes mundane fire.

Description: Breathe and move freely underwater. At higher tiers extend to the whole party.
Tier 1 Default: Caster can breathe and move normally underwater for 1 exploration turn.

Description: Shape and redirect water. Channel dam or release. Control over force.
Tier 1 Default: Redirect a body of water or create a current strong enough to push a person.

Description: Removes poisons and toxins. Water purifying the body. Distinct from HEAL.
Tier 1 Default: Remove one poison or disease condition from a target.
Notes: Water tradition's healing rune: pairs with HEAL

Description: Seismic force. Erupting rock spikes falling debris earthquake at high tiers. Terrain destruction.
Tier 1 Default: Rock spike erupts under one target: 1d6 damage AGI save or knocked prone.

Description: Loose earth: blinding clouds shifting ground partial burial. Subtler than RUIN.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes AGI save or is blinded until end of their next turn.

Description: Fine particulate. Obscures clogs mechanisms.
Tier 1 Default: Create an obscuring cloud in one zone: -1 to all rolls inside it.
Notes: Overlaps with SMOG at higher tiers

Description: Tunneling and excavation. Opens passages creates pit traps collapses floors.
Tier 1 Default: Open or enlarge a passage through up to 1 foot of non-magical stone or earth.

Description: Shape earth at will: raise walls lower terrain redirect tunnels. The terraforming rune.
Tier 1 Default: Raise or lower a 5ft section of earth or stone by up to 3 feet.

Description: Accelerates growth. Heals plants creates difficult terrain entangles at higher tiers.
Tier 1 Default: One zone becomes difficult terrain as plants rapidly grow.

Description: Immobilization. Roots erupt and hold targets. Pure control.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes STR save or is held: cannot move until they break free.

Description: Climbing binding grappling. More mobile than ROOT: vines reach and wrap.
Tier 1 Default: Caster or one target can climb any surface at normal speed for 1 turn.

Description: Natural armor from living wood. Grants AR rating to a target.
Tier 1 Default: One target gains AR 1 from living bark until they take significant damage.

Description: Summon or animate a tree. Barrier ally or structural element depending on MP spent.
Tier 1 Default: Rapidly grow a small tree: provides cover or blocks a passage.

Description: Featherfall camouflage gentle landing. Subtle nature magic utility-focused.
Tier 1 Default: Target falls at feather speed: no fall damage.

Description: Slow and silent growth. Muffles sound slicks surfaces conceals passages.
Tier 1 Default: One surface becomes slick with moss: AGI save or fall when moving across it.

Description: Decay and rot. Weakens structures and objects. The dark side of nature.
Tier 1 Default: One non-magical object begins rapidly decaying: weakened and brittle within a round.

Description: Plant and grow something specific. Slow but permanent: results outlast the casting.
Tier 1 Default: Plant a seed that will grow into a full plant within a day.

Description: Restore HP on touch. Nature tradition: the body as a living thing returning to health.
Tier 1 Default: Restore 1d6 HP to one target on touch.
Notes: Nature and light traditions both access this

Description: Offensive wind. Knockback buffeting forced movement. Scales to a localized storm.
Tier 1 Default: All targets in a zone make STR save or are pushed back one zone.

Description: A directed burst of air. Pushes objects deflects missiles creates brief openings.
Tier 1 Default: Deflect one incoming ranged attack: it misses automatically.

Description: Speed. Burst movement for caster or target. Wind as momentum.
Tier 1 Default: One target may move an additional zone this round.

Description: Sonic attack. Disorienting sound structural damage at high tiers.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes RES save or is deafened and disoriented: -1 to rolls for 1 round.

Description: Silence a zone or target. Prevents spellcasting communication detection by sound.
Tier 1 Default: One zone or target is silenced: no sound in or out for 1 round per MP spent.

Description: Levitation. Float objects or targets. At high tiers true flight.
Tier 1 Default: One object or willing target floats up to 10ft off the ground for 1 turn.

Description: Sharpness and precision: wind as a cutting edge. Slash damage at range.
Tier 1 Default: Strike one target for 1d4 damage at range: ignores AR from soft armor.

Description: Reduce movement and action speed. Wind as resistance and drag.
Tier 1 Default: One target moves at half speed and acts last in initiative for 1 round.

Description: A spirit wind cry. Terror or inspiration depending on caster intent.
Tier 1 Default: All enemies in earshot make CHA save or are shaken: -1 to ATK next round.

Description: Create light. At higher tiers blinding radiance or a persistent beacon.
Tier 1 Default: Illuminate a zone with bright light for 1 exploration turn.

Description: Holy light: potent against undead and spirits. The ceremonial Ethos church rune.
Tier 1 Default: One undead or spirit target takes 1d6 damage and makes CHA save or flees.

Description: Protective barrier. Ignore non-magical attacks at low tiers absorb magical at high.
Tier 1 Default: Caster ignores the next non-magical attack that hits them.

Description: Light as the enemy of darkness. Effective against undead spirits dark magic.
Tier 1 Default: One undead or spirit target is at -2 to all rolls while BANE is active.

Description: Righteous destruction. Concentrated holy force on one target. The offensive light rune.
Tier 1 Default: One target takes 1d6 damage: counts as magical for purposes of resistances.

Description: Cleanse corruption curse contamination. Removes conditions caused by dark magic.
Tier 1 Default: Remove one curse or dark-magic condition from a target.

Description: Restore objects and minor physical damage. Light as repair.
Tier 1 Default: Repair one damaged non-magical object fully.

Description: The resurrection rune. Revive a defeated character.
Tier 1 Default: Stabilize a defeated character: they regain 1 HP and are no longer dying.
Notes: High MP cost at higher tiers for full revival

Description: Lock and bind. Seals doors traps spirits prevents passage.
Tier 1 Default: Magically lock one door or container: requires magic to open.

Description: Cycles and tides of power. Buffs and transforms depending on phase.
Tier 1 Default: Grant one target +1 to all rolls until the next combat round.
Notes: Shaman-specific: may vary by actual moon phase

Description: Celestial force: distant and precise. Guidance navigation targeted energy from above.
Tier 1 Default: Strike one target at extreme range for 1d6: can target through obstacles if caster has line of sight.

Description: Pure negation. Erases matter magic and effect. The most absolute destructive rune.
Tier 1 Default: One target takes 1d6 damage that bypasses all armor including magic.

Description: Invisibility and ethereal movement. Pass through walls at high tiers.
Tier 1 Default: Caster becomes invisible until they attack or cast.

Description: Antimagic. Dispel active spells disrupt relic tech counter other RUNE castings.
Tier 1 Default: End one active magical effect within range.

Description: Mark a target for death. Low tiers: a curse. High tiers: instant defeat regardless of HP.
Tier 1 Default: One target is cursed: next time they fail a save they also gain a condition (1 slot).

Description: The forbidden rune. Instant death effect. Transgressive knowledge most traditions hide.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes RES save vs 16 or is immediately defeated regardless of HP.
Notes: Forbidden: most traditions don't teach this

Description: Darkness descends. Magical shadow blocks light disorients and frightens.
Tier 1 Default: One zone is plunged into magical darkness: light sources don't work inside it.

Description: The threshold rune: neither light nor dark. See in darkness pass between states.
Tier 1 Default: Caster can see perfectly in darkness for 1 exploration turn.

Description: Diminish and weaken. Reduce stats drain MP sap strength over time.
Tier 1 Default: One target's next attack or spell does half effect.

Description: Panic and rout. Targets flee or freeze. Does not affect undead or mindless creatures.
Tier 1 Default: One target makes CHA save or spends their next action fleeing.

Description: Read surface thoughts. At high tiers two-way mental connection or full mind-read.
Tier 1 Default: Sense the surface emotions and general intent of one target in range.

Description: Psychic message. 10 words at 1 MP scales to full mental conversation at range.
Tier 1 Default: Send a 10-word telepathic message to one target you can see.

Description: Pacify aggression in any target. Breaks if attacked. Does not work on mindless creatures.
Tier 1 Default: One target stops attacking and acts peacefully until threatened.

Description: Immobilize one target briefly. Standard control.
Tier 1 Default: One target loses their next action (RES save to resist).

Description: Compulsion. Force a specific action or behavior. Stronger than CALM: active control.
Tier 1 Default: One target must obey one simple instruction on their next turn (CHA save resists).

Description: Distort perception. Targets see false images lose direction believe untrue things.
Tier 1 Default: One target believes a simple false thing for 1 round: they act on it.

Description: Sleep. Willing or unwilling depending on MP spent.
Tier 1 Default: One target falls into light sleep (CHA save resists: harder with more MP).

Description: Spirit communion. Reach across to the spirit world call or speak with specific entities.
Tier 1 Default: Sense and briefly communicate with any spirits present in the current location.

Description: Summon the caster's bonded familiar or spirit animal. At high tiers call wild animals to aid.
Tier 1 Default: Summon the caster's familiar to their location.

Description: Awaken beast nature. Enhance animal instincts grant feral senses and abilities.
Tier 1 Default: Caster gains keen animal senses: cannot be surprised for 1 turn.

Description: Tooth and claw: natural weapon attack. Bite tear poison at high tiers.
Tier 1 Default: Caster's unarmed strikes deal d6 damage and count as magical this round.

Description: Rally allies around a common purpose. Morale and coordination: the wolf-pack effect.
Tier 1 Default: All allies who can hear the caster gain +1 ATK until end of round.

Description: Track and pursue unerringly. Unerring sense of a target's location.
Tier 1 Default: Caster knows the direction and approximate distance to one named target for 1 day.

Description: Animal-specific CALM. Docility toward the caster. Permanent at high tiers.
Tier 1 Default: One animal becomes docile and non-threatening toward the caster.

Description: Draw creatures toward the caster. Works on animals and spirits.
Tier 1 Default: One animal or spirit is compelled to approach the caster (CHA save resists).

Description: Move through locked doors and solid surfaces. Reverse seals a door magically.
Tier 1 Default: Open any non-magically locked door or simple physical barrier.

Description: Fly. Half speed any direction. Falls if caster is knocked out.
Tier 1 Default: Caster floats up to 10ft off the ground and can move vertically this round.

Description: Enhanced jumping. Cross gaps reach heights land safely from any fall.
Tier 1 Default: Caster can jump up to 30ft horizontally or 15ft vertically this round.

Description: Instant movement burst. Short-range teleport or extreme speed for one action.
Tier 1 Default: Caster instantly moves up to 2 zones: bypasses engagement rules.

Description: Freeze time for one target. No actions but also invulnerable while stopped.
Tier 1 Default: One target is frozen in time for 1 round: cannot act or be harmed.

Description: Exchange positions of two targets. Tactical repositioning or defensive use.
Tier 1 Default: Swap the positions of any two targets within range (RES save resists for unwilling targets).

Description: Locate treasure or a specific object within range. Does not reveal guardians.
Tier 1 Default: Sense the direction of the nearest valuable object or specific item type within 100ft.

Description: See through walls up to 10ft thick. Targets seen can be targeted by other spells.
Tier 1 Default: See through up to 10ft of solid material for 1 round.

Description: Identify the properties of a magic item or relic. One item per round.
Tier 1 Default: Learn the basic function and activation method of one magic item or relic.

Description: Understand any written language or inscription including ancient runes and old-world script.
Tier 1 Default: Read and understand any written text regardless of language.

Description: Sense the presence of a specific thing: magic life spirits: within range.
Tier 1 Default: Detect whether a specified thing (magic / living creatures / spirits) is present within 30ft.

Description: Leave a magical signature or beacon. Invisible except to detection. Permanent until dispelled.
Tier 1 Default: Leave an invisible magical mark on a surface or object: detectable by SEEK or SCAN.

Description: Read a target's surface information: alignment tier active spells current HP.
Tier 1 Default: Learn one piece of hidden information about a target: HP / tier / active spells / alignment.

Description: Concussive explosion. Force and impact rather than sustained fire. Knockback and structural damage.
Tier 1 Default: One target takes 1d6 damage and is knocked back one zone (AGI save resists the knockback).
Notes: Distinct from FIRE/BURN - the force of ignition not the flame itself

Description: Combine with an element rune to create a barrier. Inert alone.
Tier 1 Default: No effect alone: must be combined with an element rune.

Description: Inscribe another rune onto a surface for delayed or conditional activation.
Tier 1 Default: No effect alone: must specify a trigger condition and a second rune.

Description: Repeat the last rune cast for 1 MP regardless of source spell tier.
Tier 1 Default: Repeat the last spell cast at its minimum (1 MP) effect.

Description: Amplify or alter an active magical effect combined with another rune.
Tier 1 Default: No effect alone: must be combined with an active magical effect.
